title: Keep calm, carry on, examine algorithms, says Latvian President
summary_full: Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs on Wednesday called on the public to stay calm and not rise to Russia's repeated attempts at intimidation.
summary_public: Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs on Wednesday called on the public to stay calm and not rise to Russia's repeated attempts at intimidation.

LV.label: positive
LV.evidence: Latvian President called on public to stay calm and not rise to Russia's intimidation
